creator: freebsd@oldach.net
text:
Simple fix is to prepend "export" in /usr/sbin/periodic on this line:

_localbase=`/sbin/sysctl -n user.localbase 2> /dev/null`

However it smells like it's more adequate to follow the _localbase logic implemented by rc(8), which is defaulting _localbase in defaults/rc.conf.
